title: Point Lobos San Francisco, CA - Last Updated June 2026 - Yelp
content: It sits right on the beach and is tucked in between small cliffs. It's also a great place see Point Lobos or start a hike along the Lands End Trail.

title: Point Lobos Loop Trail hike review - Facebook
content: Wow! Super beautiful place on my first time visiting. Took about 4 hours to do the 10 km counterclockwise loop due to the plethora of photo ops.

title: Is this Point Lobos State Reserve Hiking Trail Really a Crown Jewel?
content: We did enjoy the walk and the scenery was beautiful, but I wouldn't consider it the ultimate or standout experience of coastal California. Rock
